positive: Intricate, highly detailed linework illustration of a mystical celestial fox perched amidst floating geometric moons and stylized constellation clusters. The composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and designed as a clean, high-contrast silhouette suitable for screen-printing on apparel. Use only deep black ink lines on a pristine white background. The style should be a blend of minimalist tattoo flash art and Japanese ornamental design, maximizing negative space and featuring clean, crisp, repeating patterns. Whimsical, elegant, forest magic.
